title: Cannabis-based products for medicinal use
body: "The Advisory Council on the Misuse of Drugs (ACMD) is currently reviewing the impact of the 2018 changes to the Misuse of Drugs Regulations 2001 which included cannabis-based products for medicinal use (CBPMs).  CBPMs are cannabis-based products for medicinal use in humans, which have not been assessed by the medicines regulator.  The review will:   consider whether the legislation had the intended impact identify unintended consequences make recommendations on how to mitigate unintended consequences   The call is intended for:   healthcare professionals researchers and academics importers and manufacturers individuals with lived or living experience patients and families of patients regulatory and enforcement bodies   "
